description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8-jdk Docker image, defines three stages (build, test, deploy), and sets a before_script to export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle and an after_script to echo "End CI". Cache the .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches directories. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assemble, publishes the resulting build/libs/*.jar files as artifacts retained for one week, and is limited to the master branch. In the test stage add a test job that runs ./gradlew check. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs ./gradlew uploadArchives, runs only on the master branch and excludes tag pipelines, thereby publishing the built JARs to a Maven repository.
